industryUsage.description:
The reason for the amount update. Possible values: 
* **delayedCharge** 
* **noShow** 
* **installment**

lineItems.description:
Price and product information of the refunded items, required for [partial refunds](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/refund#refund-a-payment).
> This field is required for partial refunds with 3x 4x Oney, Affirm, Afterpay, Atome, Clearpay, Klarna, Ratepay, Walley, and Zip.

merchantAccount.description: The merchant account that is used to process the payment.

paymentPspReference.description: The [`pspReference`](https://docs.adyen.com/api-explorer/#/CheckoutService/latest/post/payments__resParam_pspReference) of the payment to update.

pspReference.description: Adyen's 16-character reference associated with the amount update request.

reference.description: Your reference for the amount update request. Maximum length: 80 characters.

splits.description: An array of objects specifying how the amount should be split between accounts when using Adyen for Platforms. For details, refer to [Providing split information](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces-and-platforms/processing-payments#providing-split-information).

status.description: The status of your request. This will always have the value **received**.
